vocab.meaning: leo lên nấc thang sự nghiệp (thăng tiến)
vocab.example: I am currently working as a junior auditor, with a strong ambition to climb the corporate ladder within the next few years.
Being a final-year student, I often have to cope with a heavy workload of assignments and research projects.
I chose to major in Computer Science because the career prospects in this field are incredibly promising.

vocab.meaning: bắt đầu một hành trình (thường là học tập hoặc sự nghiệp)
vocab.example: I've recently embarked on a journey to obtain my Master’s degree in International Relations.
While my current job is demanding, it provides a lucrative income that allows me to live comfortably in the city.

vocab.meaning: sự khắt khe/nghiêm ngặt trong học thuật
vocab.example: The academic rigor of my university course has truly pushed me to develop better critical thinking skills.
Instead of a traditional degree, I opted for vocational training to gain hands-on experience in culinary arts.

vocab.meaning: sự cân bằng giữa công việc và cuộc sống
vocab.example: One thing I appreciate about my employer is that they prioritize work-life balance for all staff members.

vocab.meaning: theo đuổi giáo dục bậc cao (đại học, cao học)
vocab.example: After working for two years, I decided to take a break to pursue higher education abroad.
My company often sponsors workshops and seminars to encourage continuous professional development.
